name: Donna Gordon

contactInfo.office: 401 E. Goliad St., Suite 300, Crockett, TX 75835

bio: Donna Gordon serves as the District Attorney for Houston County, leading criminal prosecutions in the Crockett area. She is dedicated to upholding justice and ensuring the safety of Houston County communities.
campaignPromises: Prosecute violent crimes to the fullest extent
Combat illegal drug activity in Houston County
Advocate for victims throughout the criminal justice process
Maintain transparency and integrity in the DA's office
Partner with law enforcement to improve public safety
